title: Why did the prisoner attack the driver?

meanings.usage: 描述动作进行的速度快
统一规格的服装，常指军服或工作服
指光亮强烈地照射或燃烧
指从束缚或危险中逃离
军队中有军衔的人或政府官员
军队中下级对上级表示敬意的动作
形容刀刃锋利或动作突然有力
指用拳头或工具的强力撞击
描述无所畏惧地做某事
stand to attention表示立正姿势

examples.en: He dragged the box into the room.
She changed into her sports clothes.
The soldier marched up and down in front of the gate.
The soldiers stood to attention when the officer passed.
examples.zh: 当军官经过时，士兵们立正敬礼。

examples.en: A stranger came towards me on the street.
examples.zh: 街上一个陌生人向我走来。

examples.en: He knocked the man to the ground with one punch.
examples.zh: 他一拳把那人打倒在地。

examples.en: The thief drove off at high speed.
They couldn't see anything in the darkness.
examples.zh: 他们在黑暗中什么都看不见。

phrases.phrase: with a rifle over his shoulder

examples.en: He stood there with a bag over his shoulder.
examples.zh: 他肩上背着包站在那里。

examples.en: He jumped into the car and drove away.

grammar.title: 过去完成时 (Past Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻之前已经完成的动作或状态，由had + 过去分词构成
grammar.structure: 主语 + had + 过去分词 + (before + 过去时态)...
grammar.usage: 用于描述两个过去的动作，先发生的动作用过去完成时，后发生的动作用一般过去时。常与when, after, before等连词连用。

examples.en: When he had killed the guard, the prisoner dragged him into the bushes.
examples.zh: 当他杀死卫兵后，囚犯把他拖进了灌木丛。

examples.en: When they had gone, the driver came towards him.
examples.zh: 他们走后，司机向他走来。

grammar.title: 过去进行时与一般过去时的对比
grammar.definition: 过去进行时表示过去某时刻正在进行的动作，一般过去时表示过去已完成的动作
grammar.structure: was/were + doing (过去进行时) vs. did (一般过去时)
grammar.usage: 当一个长时间动作正在进行时，另一个短动作发生，此时用过去进行时+when+一般过去时

examples.en: Lights were blazing and men were running here and there.
examples.zh: 灯光明亮，人们四处奔跑。

examples.en: The officers got out and the prisoner stood to attention.
examples.zh: 军官们下车了，囚犯立正敬礼。

grammar.title: with复合结构
grammar.definition: with + 宾语 + 介词短语/形容词/副词/分词，表示附带状态或伴随情况
grammar.structure: with + 名词/代词 + 介词短语/形容词/副词/分词
grammar.usage: 用于描述事物的状态、穿着、携带物品等，可作状语或定语

examples.en: Now, dressed in a blue uniform and with a rifle over his shoulder, the prisoner marched boldly.
examples.zh: 现在，穿着蓝色制服，肩上扛着步枪，囚犯大胆地来回走动。

examples.en: The man was rather elderly with grey hair and clear blue eyes.
examples.zh: 这人年纪较大，满头白发，碧蓝的眼睛。

sentencePatterns.pattern: When + 主语 + had + 过去分词..., 主语 + 过去时态...

original.en: When he had killed the guard, the prisoner quickly dragged him into the bushes.
original.zh: 当他杀死卫兵后，囚犯迅速把他拖进了灌木丛。

imitations.en: When I had finished my homework, I went to bed.
imitations.zh: 当我完成作业后，我就去睡觉了。

imitations.en: When she had cooked dinner, she called the family.
imitations.zh: 她做完饭后，叫家人吃饭。

sentencePatterns.pattern: ...with + 名词 + 介词短语/形容词...

original.en: He was rather elderly with grey hair and clear blue eyes.
original.zh: 这人年纪较大，满头白发，碧蓝的眼睛。

imitations.en: The girl stood there with a red flower in her hand.
imitations.zh: 女孩手里拿着一朵红花站在那里。

imitations.en: He came in with his head down.

original.en: The man obviously wanted to talk.

imitations.en: She wanted to buy a new car.
They wanted to travel around the world.

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + 动词 + off + as + 形容词/副词比较级 + as + 主语 + could

original.en: He drove off as quickly as he could.
original.zh: 他尽可能快地开车离开了。

imitations.en: She ran away as fast as she could.
He finished the work as soon as he could.
